_comment: Copy to config.json and adjust. Plan caps are user-calibratable because Anthropic/OpenAI report limits in relative terms. Set hpMaxTokens to the token budget you want a full HP bar to represent.

cursor._note: Cursor/Copilot have no stable local JSONL yet. Until adapters land, set manualPercent (0-100) to show them in the party, or point logDir at a future export.

notify._note: Edge-triggered desktop notifications when status worsens. Windows tray balloon / macOS / Linux notify-send.
